module.title: Disk and file checker
module.description: CheckDisk can check various file and disk related things.
module.name: CheckDisk

commands.check_drivesize: Check the size (free-space) of a drive or volume.
commands.check_files: Check various aspects of a file and/or folder.
commands.check_single_file: Check various aspects of a single file (size, age, line count, version, ...). Simpler alternative to check_files when you only need to inspect one specific file.
commands.check_disk_io: Check disk I/O performance metrics (throughput, IOPS, queue length, busy time).
commands.check_disk_health: Combined per-drive health check (free space + I/O metrics).
